title: RUSTINS Quick Drying Matt Black Paint 250ml -Easy DIY Application for a Professional Finish in Minutes, Ideal for Interior & Exterior Surfaces
features: Rapid Drying Technology: Experience the convenience of quick-drying paint that delivers a flawless, matt black finish in no time, saving you valuable hours on your projects.
Versatile Application: Suitable for both interior and exterior surfaces, this quick-drying paint is perfect for furniture, walls, doors, and more. Achieve a professional look effortlessly.
Effortless Application – ADD TO CART now: The user-friendly formula ensures easy application, making it an ideal choice for DIY enthusiasts and professionals alike. Enhance your projects with ease.
Long-Lasting and Durable: Enjoy the benefits of a durable and long-lasting finish that resists wear and tear, maintaining its rich black color for an extended period.
Professional-Grade Quality: Rustins Quick Drying Matt Black Paint is formulated to meet the highest standards, providing a sleek, professional finish that elevates the appearance of any surface.
description: From the manufacturer Rustins Matt Black Paint A smooth matt black finish for wrought iron and wood. Suitable for interior and exterior use. Clean brushes in water Water based & quick drying For wrought iron & wood Available Sizes 250ml 500ml1 litre 2.5 litre About Rustins I n 1924 Sidney Rustin opened his first shop in London's Shoreditch district where he sold wood finishing products to local residents and trades people. Ronnie Rustin, Sidney's son, took over the business and ran it until his death in 2008. He drove the growth of Rustins to be one of the best brands in the industry with a focus on wood finishing products, speciality paints and decorating sundries. Rustins products sell throughout the UK to home DIY enthusiasts and professionals who want quality and innovative products.
